name: WireGuard
description: Run your own free and unlimited WireGuard VPN
compose:
name: slashnode-wireguard
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/wg-easy/wg-easy:15.3.0
    container_name: app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
      - SYS_MODULE
    environment:
      PORT: '51821'
      INSECURE: 'true'
    volumes:
      - app_data-wireguard:/etc/wireguard
      - /lib/modules:/lib/modules:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:51821:51821
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-wireguard:
    name: slashnode-wireguard_app_data-wireguard
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (wireguard). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://github.com/wg-easy/wg-easy. Default login — user: "umbrel", password: "". ⚠️ SECURITY: app: extra capabilities ["NET_ADMIN","SYS_MODULE"].
